title: Enrolling in Online Account Access
content: Register for Prudential Online Account Access at prudential.com. For enrollment help by phone, call 1-800-PRU-HELP (778-4357), Mon-Fri 8 AM-10 PM ET. Once enrolled, you can view policy values, manage beneficiaries, make payments, check transaction status, and access documents.
agentNotes: Enrollment requires policy info for verification. Voice biometrics available for faster future verification.

title: Self-Service Online Capabilities
content: Through your online account for Individual Life Insurance: view death benefit, cash values, loan values, and beneficiary info; change address, email, and beneficiary; request loans; manage EFT payments; view annual statements, premium notices, and tax documents; check transaction status.
agentNotes: Guide customers to self-service first for routine tasks — reduces call volume.

title: Secure Messaging
content: After registering for an online account, use Prudential's secure messaging to communicate with customer service at your convenience. Available 24/7 for submitting requests and receiving responses without waiting on hold.
agentNotes: Secure messaging is preferred for non-urgent complex requests.

title: Voice Biometrics
content: Prudential offers voice biometrics enrollment for faster identity verification on future calls, reducing the need to answer security questions every time for routine inquiries.
agentNotes: Voice biometrics speeds up repeat callers — mention during enrollment calls.
